business.name: Heating and Air
business.tagline: Real fixes, fair prices, Macon trust

hero.headline: When your AC dies in *July heat*, we answer
hero.subheadline: Mr. Lee shows up himself — no rookies, no runaround. Just the depth of experience to fix it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every system, every fix
services_section.subheading: From emergency breakdowns to full replacements — we handle what keeps Macon comfortable

services.title: AC Repair & Service
services.description: When the cool air stops, we find why. Complete diagnostics, honest options, and repairs that stick.

services.title: Heating System Repair
services.description: Furnace acting up? Heat pump struggling? We get to the root cause and give you options that make sense.

services.title: Ductwork Replacement
services.description: Leaky ducts waste money and comfort. We'll replace what's broken and get your system breathing right.

services.title: Complete System Installation
services.description: New construction or full replacement — we size it right and install it to last in Georgia heat.

about.heading: The guy who shows up
about.body: Mr. Lee brings decades of HVAC experience to every job in Macon. No junior techs, no sales pressure — just honest diagnosis and quality work. When your system breaks down, you get the owner's full attention until it's running right again.

reviews.name: Paige T.
reviews.text: This is the HVAC company you dream of — Mr. Lee shows up himself, gets to the root of problems, and does exactly what he promises. Excellence is worth paying for.

reviews.name: Glenda M.
reviews.text: Professional and caring. Replaced my ductwork and cleaned my AC system — house is cool again! Outstanding service from start to finish.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Reliable HVAC service across Bibb County and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready for real HVAC service?
cta.body: No games, no pressure — just honest diagnosis and quality repairs. Call Mr. Lee directly for your estimate.
